---
title: "Journals"
toc: true
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---

The **Web of Science Core Collection™** is the premier resource on the platform and includes over 21,000 peer-reviewed, high-quality scholarly journals.

It comprises four key indices:

1. **Science Citation Index Expanded™ (SCIE)**: Covers more than 9,200 of the world’s most impactful journals.
2. **Social Sciences Citation Index™ (SSCI)**: Covers over 3,400 of the world’s leading journals of social sciences.
3. **Arts & Humanities Citation Index™ (AHCI)**: Covers over 1,800 journals.
4. **Emerging Sources Citation Index™ (ESCI)**: Covers emerging trends.

This list is specifically compiled for research areas including:

* Rural Development, Labour Livelihood
* Environment, Vegetation, Degradation, LULC Change
* Water, Ground Water, Drought, Flood
* Climate, Extreme Events
* Soil, Topography
* Remote Sensing (SAR Radar, etc.)

## Prioritizing No-Fee Publishing

To support researchers with limited funding, this list **prioritizes journals that offer a "Subscription" or "Hybrid" model**. In this model, **authors do NOT pay publication fees** (Article Processing Charges - APCs).

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;">
  <a href="https://mjl.clarivate.com/manuscript-matcher" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <i class="bi bi-search"></i> Find Journals with Manuscript Matcher
  </a>
</div>

<br>

## Journal Finder Tools

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://wos-journal.info/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>WoS & SCI Journal Search</h3>
Easily search for Web of Science (SCI/SCIE/SSCI) indexed journals, verify their quartiles, and check Impact Factors for quality assurance.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://listofjournals.com/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>List of Journals</h3>
A comprehensive directory to browse and discover academic journals across various disciplines, indexing services, and publishers.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://journalsearches.com/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>Journal Searches</h3>
An advanced tool designed to help researchers identify the most suitable journals for their manuscripts based on scope and metrics.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://phdtalks.org/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>PhD Talks</h3>
A comprehensive portal providing daily updates on academic opportunities, research tools, writing guides, and career advice for PhD candidates.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::
:::

<br>

## Publisher Submission Guide: Avoiding Fees

Most top-tier journals are **Hybrid**, meaning they offer both a **Subscription** (Free for authors) and an **Open Access** (Paid) option. To avoid paying Article Processing Charges (APCs), you must select the correct option during submission.

::: {.callout-tip}
### 💡 Key Terminology
*   **Subscription / Traditional**: The reader pays (via university library), so the **author pays nothing**.
*   **Gold Open Access**: The author pays an APC to make the article free for everyone.
*   **Hybrid**: A journal that offers **BOTH** options. You must strictly choose "Subscription" to publish for free.
:::

### How to Select "No-Fee" by Publisher

| Publisher | System Name | Action Required for Free Publishing |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Elsevier** | Editorial Manager | Look for the **"Publishing Options"** step after acceptance. Select **"Subscription"** (often the default is Open Access, be careful). |
| **Springer** | Editorial Manager / SNAPP | During submission, you will be asked about Open Access. Select **"No, I want to publish my article via the traditional subscription model"**. |
| **Wiley** | ScholarOne | In the license signing phase (Author Services), choose the **"OnlineOpen: No"** or **"Standard License"** option. |
| **Taylor & Francis** | ScholarOne | After acceptance, select **"Standard Article"** (Green OA compliant) instead of "Gold Open Access". |
| **IEEE** | ScholarOne | IEEE often has page charges for long papers (e.g., >10 pages). Standard publication is free within page limits; avoid selecting "Open Access". |

<br>

## Prioritized Journal Lists

The following lists are curated for researchers seeking **Web of Science (SCIE/SSCI/AHCI/ESCI)** indexed journals with **No-Fee (Subscription/Hybrid)** publication options.

::: {.callout-note}
**Note:** "Hybrid" journals allow authors to choose between publishing via the subscription model (free for authors) or Open Access (APC applies). Select the **Subscription** option upon submission to avoid fees.
:::

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Rural & Development

**Focus:** Rural Development, Livelihoods, Socio-economic Geography, Regional Studies.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **[Journal of Rural Studies](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-rural-studies){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[World Development](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/world-development){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Land Use Policy](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/land-use-policy){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Journal of Peasant Studies](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/fjps20){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Sociologia Ruralis](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14679523){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Geoforum](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/geoforum){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Applied Geography](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/applied-geography){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Regional Studies](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/cres20){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Habitat International](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/habitat-international){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Journal of Rural & Community Dev.](https://journals.brandonu.ca/jrcd/){target="_blank"}** | ESCI | Brandon Univ. | Diamond OA (No Fee) |
| **[Population, Space and Place](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/15448452){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |

## Environment & LULC

**Focus:** LULC Change, Degradation, Soil Science, Environmental Management.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **[Journal of Environmental Management](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-environmental-management){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Global Environmental Change](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/global-environmental-change){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Science of the Total Environment](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/science-of-the-total-environment){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Land Degradation & Development](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/1099145x){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Catena](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/catena){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Geoderma](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/geoderma){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Soil and Tillage Research](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/soil-and-tillage-research){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Ecological Indicators](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/ecological-indicators){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Geomorphology](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/geomorphology){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Earth Surface Processes and Landforms](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/10969837){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Landscape and Urban Planning](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/landscape-and-urban-planning){target="_blank"}** | SSCI/SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Environmental Monitoring and Assessment](https://www.springer.com/journal/10661){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Environmental Science & Policy](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/environmental-science-and-policy){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |

## Water Resources

**Focus:** Hydrology, Water Management, Groundwater, Ecohydrology.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **[Journal of Hydrology](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-hydrology){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Water Research](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/water-research){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Water Resources Research](https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/19447973){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | AGU / Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Water Resources Management](https://www.springer.com/journal/11269){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Hydrological Processes](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/10991085){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Advances in Water Resources](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/advances-in-water-resources){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Hydrological Sciences Journal](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/thsj20){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Groundwater](https://ngwa.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/17456584){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[River Research and Applications](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/15351467){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |

## Natural Hazards & Climate

**Focus:** Climate Change, Extreme Events, Disaster Risk Reduction, Flood/Drought Monitoring.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **[Global and Planetary Change](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/global-and-planetary-change){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Climate Dynamics](https://link.springer.com/journal/382){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Natural Hazards](https://www.springer.com/journal/11069){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1/Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Int. J. of Disaster Risk Reduction](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/international-journal-of-disaster-risk-reduction){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Climatic Change](https://www.springer.com/journal/10584){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[International Journal of Climatology](https://rmets.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/10970088){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Atmospheric Research](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/atmospheric-research){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Journal of Flood Risk Management](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/1753318x){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1/Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Environmental Hazards](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/tenh20){target="_blank"}** | SSCI/SCIE (Q1)| Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Theoretical and Applied Climatology](https://www.springer.com/journal/704){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Disaster Prevention and Management](https://www.emerald.com/insight/publication/issn/0965-3562){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q3) | Emerald | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Nature Climate Change](https://www.nature.com/nclimate/){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Nature Portfolio | Subscription (No Fee) |

## RS & GIS

**Focus:** Remote Sensing, GIS, Spatial Analysis, Radar/SAR.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **[Remote Sensing of Environment](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/remote-sensing-of-environment){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[ISPRS J. of Photogrammetry & RS](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/isprs-journal-of-photogrammetry-and-remote-sensing){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[IEEE Trans. on Geoscience & RS](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/RecentIssue.jsp?punumber=36){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | IEEE | Hybrid (Page Charges) |
| **[Int. Journal of Remote Sensing](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/tres20){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Computers & Geosciences](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/computers-and-geosciences){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Transactions in GIS](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14679671){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Cartography & Geog. Info. Science](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/tcag20){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q2) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Journal of Spatial Science](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/tjss20){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q3) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Photogrammetric Eng. & Remote Sensing](https://www.asprs.org/photogrammetric-engineering-and-remote-sensing){target="_blank"}**| SCIE (Q2) | ASPRS | Hybrid (Page Charges) |
| **[GeoInformatica](https://www.springer.com/journal/10707){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) |

## Agriculture & Ecology

**Focus:** Agroforestry, Crop Science, Forest Management, Soil-Plant Systems.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **[Agricultural Water Management](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/agricultural-water-management){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Agriculture, Ecosystems & Env.](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/agriculture-ecosystems-and-environment){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Forest Ecology and Management](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/forest-ecology-and-management){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Agroforestry Systems](https://www.springer.com/journal/10457){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Paddy and Water Environment](https://www.springer.com/journal/10333){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Soil Use and Management](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14752743){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Nutrient Cycling in Agroecosystems](https://www.springer.com/journal/10705){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q2) | Springer | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Crop Protection](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/crop-protection){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |

## Urban & Planning

**Focus:** Urbanization, Regional Planning, Smart Cities, Sustainable Cities.

| Journal | Index | Publisher | Fee Model |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **[Cities](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/cities){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Sustainable Cities and Society](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/sustainable-cities-and-society){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Urban Forestry & Urban Greening](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/urban-forestry-and-urban-greening){target="_blank"}** | SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Computers, Env. & Urban Systems](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/computers-environment-and-urban-systems){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Journal of Urban Planning & Dev.](https://ascelibrary.org/journal/jupddm){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q2) | ASCE | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[European Planning Studies](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/ceps20){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q2) | Taylor & Francis | Hybrid (Free Option) |
| **[Journal of Regional Science](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14679787){target="_blank"}** | SSCI (Q2) | Wiley | Hybrid (Free Option) |

:::

<br>

## 🛡️ Submission & Safety Tips

Before submitting your manuscript, ensure you verify the journal's credibility and understand its metrics.

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 📊 Understanding Metrics
Journals are ranked by **Impact Factor (IF)** within their subject categories (e.g., Geography, Environmental Sciences).

*   **Q1 (Top 25%)**: Highest prestige and visibility. Often hardest to accept.
*   **Q2 (Top 25-50%)**: Excellent quality, balances visibility with slightly higher acceptance rates.
*   **Q3/Q4**: Good entry points for niche topics or early-career research.
:::

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🚩 Avoiding Predatory Journals
Be cautious of **"Clone Journals"** that mimic the names of reputable titles.

1.  **Verify Indexing**: Always check the journal on the official [Master Journal List (MJL)](https://mjl.clarivate.com/).
2.  **Check ISSN**: Ensure the ISSN on the journal website matches the one on MJL.
3.  **Red Flags**: Avoid journals promising "Review in 3 days" or "Guaranteed Publication".

:::

:::

<br>

## 🎯 Journals on Target

List of specific journals targeted for future submissions (Jan 2026).

| Journal | Publisher | Indexing | ISSN | Metrics (IF / SJR / Q) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **[Environmental Sustainability](https://link.springer.com/journal/42398){target="_blank"}** | Springer Nature | ESCI (WoS), UGC CARE | 2523-8922 | IF: 2.8 |
| **[Journal of City Climate Policy and Economy](https://jccpe.utpjournals.press/){target="_blank"}** | Univ. of Toronto Press | Scilit (New Journal) | 2816-7414 | N/A (New) |
| **[J. of Arid Land Resources and Env.](https://mall.cnki.net/magazine/magadetail/GHZG202401.htm){target="_blank"}** | China Science Pub. | CSCD, Scopus (Check) | 1003-7578 | N/A |
| **[J. of Asian Business & Econ. Studies](https://www.emeraldgrouppublishing.com/journal/jabes){target="_blank"}** | Emerald | Scopus (Q1), ESCI, DOAJ | 2516-1598 | IF: 3.6 / SJR: 0.66 |
| **[Swiss J. of Economics and Statistics](https://sjes.springeropen.com/){target="_blank"}** | SpringerOpen | Scopus (Q1/Q3), DOAJ | 2235-6282 | IF: 1.6 / SJR: 0.36 |
| **[Cureus J. of Agriculture & Food Science](https://www.cureusjournals.com/journal/agriculture-and-food-science){target="_blank"}** | Springer Nature | *Not yet indexed* | N/A | *Fee Waived till June 2026* |
| **[Discover Social Science & Health](https://diser.springeropen.com/){target="_blank"}** | SpringerOpen | Scopus, DOAJ | 2731-0469 | IF: 1.3 / SJR: 0.45 |
| **[SERIEs - J. of Spanish Econ. Assoc.](https://link.springer.com/journal/13209){target="_blank"}** | Springer | Scopus (Q2), SSCI | 1869-4195 | IF: 1.8 / SJR: 0.55 |

::: {.callout-warning}
**Note on Cureus:** This is a new journal under the Cureus/Springer umbrella. It is currently **not indexed** in Web of Science or Scopus. Proceed with caution for academic credit requirements.
:::

<br>

### ⏱️ How to Estimate Review Speed?
Most publishers now provide metrics on their journal homepages:
*   **Elsevier**: Look for "Time to First Decision" and "Review Time" on the Journal Insights page.
*   **Springer**: Check the "Journal Updates" or "About" section for speed metrics.
*   **Taylor & Francis**: Often displays "Speed/Acceptance" metrics in the journal banner.

<br>

## ✨ Inspirations

A collection of professional research websites and portfolios that inspire the design and structure of this platform.

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://atulclimate.github.io/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>Atul Kumar Saini</h3>
Research portfolio focusing on climate dynamics, remote sensing, and environmental modelling.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Website <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://drinduj.in/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>Dr. Induj</h3>
Professional academic platform with resources on hydrology, water resource management, and GIS.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Website <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://hydrosense.iitd.ac.in/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>HydroSense Lab (IIT Delhi)</h3>
The HydroSense Lab at IIT Delhi focuses on cutting-edge research in hydrological modelling and remote sensing.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Website <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://people.iitism.ac.in/~shushobhit/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>Shushobhit Singh (IIT ISM)</h3>
Academic page of Shushobhit Singh at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad, showcasing research in earth sciences.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Website <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

:::
